zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Ufford於1330年2月28日出生在英國林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比時，她的父親Robert de Ufford I31歲，母親Margaret Norwich33歲。她於1350年4月25日與William Ferrers 3rd Baron Ferrers of Groby在英國萊希斯特斯爾格洛比結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1368年5月25日在英國萊希斯特斯爾格洛比享年38歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾奧爾維爾史洛福特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret de Ufford于1330年2月28日出生在英国林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比时，她的父亲Robert de Ufford I31岁，母亲Margaret Norwich33岁。她于1350年4月25日与William Ferrers 3rd Baron Ferrers of Groby在英国萊希斯特斯爾格洛比结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1368年5月25日在英国萊希斯特斯爾格洛比享年38岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾奧爾維爾史洛福特。

nameMeanings.name: Ufford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Ufford (Northamptonshire), Ufford (Suffolk), or Offord Cluny or Offord Darcy (Huntingdonshire). The Northamptonshire and Suffolk placenames derive from the Old English personal name Uffa + Old English worth ‘enclosure’. For the Huntingdonshire placename see Offord , with which the surname may have been confused.

variants.name: Offord
meanings: English (East Anglia and London): habitational name from Offord Cluny and Offord Darcy in Huntindgonshire. The placename derives from Old English upp ‘up, upper’ + ford ‘ford’.
English: alternatively, from a lost place called Offord near Pennyford in Wootton Wawen, Warwickshire. The placename derives from the Old English personal name Offa + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Ufford was born on 28 February 1330, in Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Robert de Ufford I, was 31 and her mother, Margaret Norwich, was 33. She married William Ferrers 3rd Baron Ferrers of Groby on 25 April 1350, in Groby, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 25 May 1368, in Groby, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 38, and was buried in Ulverscroft, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Ufford est née le 28 février 1330, à Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Ufford I, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret Norwich, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé William Ferrers 3rd Baron Ferrers of Groby le 25 avril 1350, à Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 mai 1368, à Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à Ulverscroft, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret de Ufford am 28. Februar 1330 in Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Ufford I 31 und ihre Mutter Margaret Norwich 33. Sie hat am 25. April 1350 in Groby, Leicestershire, England William Ferrers 3rd Baron Ferrers of Groby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. Mai 1368 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Groby, Leicestershire, England und wurde in Ulverscroft, Leicestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Ufford è nata il il 28 febbraio 1330 nel Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Robert de Ufford I, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Margaret Norwich, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato William Ferrers 3rd Baron Ferrers of Groby il 25 aprile 1350, nel Groby, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 25 maggio 1368, nel Groby, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolta a Ulverscroft, Leicestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Uffordが1330年2月28日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスパルスビーで生まれた時，父Robert de Ufford Iは31歳，母Margaret Norwichは33歳であった。1350年4月25日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビーでWilliam Ferrers 3rd Baron Ferrers of Grobyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1368年5月25日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビーで38歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアウルバースクロフトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Ufford(이)가 1330년 2월 28일 영국 링코실르 스피스비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Ufford I(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Norwich(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1350년 4월 25일 영국 레이스스터실르 그로비에서 William Ferrers 3rd Baron Ferrers of Groby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1368년 5월 25일 영국 레이스스터실르 그로비에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 울버스크로프트에 묻혔다.

pt.28 February 1330–25 May 1368: 28 de fevereiro de 1330–25 de maio de 1368
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Ufford nasceu em 28 de fevereiro de 1330, em Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Ufford I, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Norwich, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com William Ferrers 3rd Baron Ferrers of Groby em 25 de abril de 1350, em Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de maio de 1368, em Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em Ulverscroft, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Ufford родилась 28 февраля 1330 г. в местности спилсби, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Ufford I было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Norwich, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Ferrers 3rd Baron Ferrers of Groby 25 апреля 1350 г. в местности гроби, лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 25 мая 1368 г. в местности гроби, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности улвирскрофт, лисестиршир, Англия.

es.28 February 1330–25 May 1368: 28 de febrero de 1330–25 de mayo de 1368
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret de Ufford nació el 28 de febrero de 1330, en Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Ufford I, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margaret Norwich, tenía 33 años. Se casó con William Ferrers 3rd Baron Ferrers of Groby el 25 de abril de 1350, en Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 25 de mayo de 1368, en Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultada en Ulverscroft, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
